title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] feat: add self-evolving Claude and Codex agent runtime
summary:
## Summary

This PR adds a runnable self-improving agent runtime to ECC so the repo does not only provide prompts, hooks, and instructions, but also a concrete agent operating loop that Claude Code and Codex can execute directly.

It introduces:

- Planner -> Architect -> Builder -> Evaluator

title: [PR] feat: profile archives, document extraction, and retrieval-based synthesis
summary:
## Summary

Adds a persistent profile archive system for multi-document candidates, alongside document extraction, retrieval-based synthesis, and several resume quality improvements. Direct upload mode is fully preserved — no breaking changes to the existing flow.
